body.title: audit-day fix-one-leave-many → auto-draft scan-for-rest tickets
body.result: Created lab/claudecode/scan_for_rest_drafter.py: ScanForRestDrafter class drafts fix-one-leave-many scan tickets to /tmp/ with area detection, caller lists, scope boundary. audit-day SKILL.md step 8 calls it. Never auto-files.
body.description:
When audit-day's fix-one-leave-many sweep finds a partial signature change (changed in N callers, not in M others), auto-draft a 'T-scan-for-remaining-call-sites-<area>' ticket containing the call graph delta. Ticket is drafted to /tmp and surfaced for /decided gating — never auto-files.

This turns the bug pattern into a self-healing loop. The proxy patterns came from Akien noticing weeks late; this catches it within 24h.

**Affected files:** audit-day skill (extension to fix-one-leave-many sweep handler); helper at lab/claudecode/scan_for_rest_drafter.py.
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry. oop-first: ScanForRestDrafter class.
**Test plan:** seed a day's commits with a partial signature change → audit-day's sweep finds it AND drafts a scan-for-rest ticket to /tmp → ticket appears in next /decided session for review.
